text:
First, note that time zones as we know them did not exist in 1489.  
But if we apply modern time zone rules for the sake of the problem:  
US/Pacific = UTC-8 (ignoring DST since 1489), Asia/Tokyo = UTC+9.  
Time difference = (9) - (-8) = 17 hours ahead.  

11:00 + 17 hours = 28:00 → 04:00 next day.  
August 19, 1489 + 1 day = August 20, 1489.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1489-08-20 04:00
